steps.title: Match Desmos to the given equation form
steps.content: The problem already tells you the model is $f(x)=mx-28$. Instead of solving from one point, enter all four table points and use a custom regression with the same fixed intercept term.

steps.title: Read the coefficient
steps.content: The row $y_1 \sim m x_1-28$ returns $m=11$. A quick algebra check with the first point gives $82=10m-28$, so $110=10m$ and $m=11$. The correct free-response answer is 11.
